description_long: This is a modern residential house complex featuring two main units, each with flat roofs and clean, geometric lines. The property is surrounded by manicured green lawns, decorative trees, and shrubs, creating a lush and inviting environment. A large, organically shaped swimming pool dominates the backyard, accompanied by a circular hot tub and a paved patio area for relaxation. The front of the house includes a driveway and a pathway leading to the main entrances, which are accentuated by minimalist landscaping. Windows are arranged in a balanced, symmetrical pattern, providing ample natural light to the interiors. The overall design emphasizes open outdoor spaces, privacy, and contemporary architectural aesthetics.
description: A modern dual-unit house with flat roofs, lush landscaping, and a large backyard pool. The design features clean lines, symmetrical windows, and a spacious driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, main entrances, and landscaped front yard with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the property, the pool area, and the arrangement of the two house units.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the large swimming pool, hot tub, and the open backyard space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, patio, and the side facades of the house units.
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist entryways with flat doors, paved paths, and subtle landscaping; no prominent porch or columns.
